title: nassella juergensii
intro: Nassella juergensii, also known as Jergens needle grass, is a species of grass native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. Nassella juergensii can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use, and it is also used in some folk remedies for its purported health benefits.
